arts.ttl: Manchester United confirmed squad members vs Brighton
arts.sum: Man United's players started to arrive at Old Trafford from 10am ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Brighton.

arts.ttl: Man United's £86m flop Antony is finally set to get his move away to end Old Trafford nightmare... with the Brazilian winger on the verge of joining 11th-place LaLiga side on loan after breakthrough in talks
arts.sum: A LaLiga side are closing in on an agreement with Manchester United over a subsidised loan with no buy option until June 2025 for Antony, Mail Sport can reveal.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy pays tribute to Manchester United great Denis Law with emotional story
arts.sum: Denis Law passed away, aged 84, as the Man United and Scotland great is fondly remembered by Leicester City manager and former Old Trafford favourite Ruud van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: Napoli director offers update on interest in Man Utd's Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Napoli's sporting director discusses interest in signing Man Utd winger Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Betis best placed to sign Man Utd's Antony on loan
arts.sum: La Liga side Real Betis lead the chase to sign Manchester United's Brazil winger Antony on loan.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Brighton live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates as Man United take on Brighton and Hove Albion at Old Trafford in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba's former Man Utd team-mate drops huge hint he's returning to Premier League
arts.sum: Paul Pogba will reach the end of his suspension in March and one of his old Manchester United team-mates has linked him with a return to the Premier League

arts.ttl: Antony nearing Man Utd exit after breakthrough in negotiations
arts.sum: Antony is close to leaving Man Utd on loan to Real Betis.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Brighton today with game not on TV
arts.sum: Manchester United host Brighton in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon, but the game will not be shown live on television in the UK - here's why and how to follow it

arts.ttl: Remembering Denis Law, the last of Manchester United's Holy Trinity
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (David Prince, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: The death of Denis Law has led to a flood of tributes to the Manchester United and Scotland legend, who passed away at the age of 84
